title: AdminNewsSubmission
description: Operator-authored payload from the /admin route (US3, FR-014). On a successful POST it becomes an intraday Event (scope=intraday, origin=admin) and flows through the same ingestion + reactive SSE path as a real intraday event (FR-016). Client-side validation here mirrors the server re-validation (FR-015); nothing is ingested on failure. Validated with JsonSchema.Net draft-2020-12 (Decision #6).

source.description: Optional fictional source label; defaults to an admin label if omitted.

affectedEntities.description: MUST contain at least one non-empty selector array (FR-015). Maps the event to the RM book (customerIds/sectors) and/or the trading book (tickers/sectors/issuers) per research R5.

sceneTargeting.description: Optional scene hints; absence => resolved by entity mapping (research R5).
